title: Imperative Management of Kubernetes Objects Using Configuration Files — Defining controller selectors and PodTemplate labels
text:
The recommended approach is to define a single, immutable PodTemplate label
used only by the controller selector with no other semantic meaning.
Example label:
selector
:
matchLabels
:
controller-selector
:
"apps/v1/deployment/nginx"
template
:
metadata
:
labels
:
controller-selector
:
"apps/v1/deployment/nginx"
